title: Neo Vanilla Additions
description: Vanilla Additions provides features that seamlessly integrate into the base game, making it feel more complete.
body:
# Neo Vanilla Additions enriches your fundamental Minecraft gameplay by introducing a suite of carefully designed quality-of-life enhancements. This mod focuses on seamlessly integrating new features that feel like they belong in the base game, providing solutions to common frustrations and expanding upon existing mechanics.

**This mod provides the following key additions:
**

![Gears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08494887f28fb70bf5105e884d783d7e51a6c885.png)
## Expanded Gear Sets:
##        
Copper Tools and Armor: Discover a complete set of copper tools (sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe) and armor (helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots). These items bridge the gap between wood and stone/iron, offering a balanced progression and practical use for copper beyond decorative blocks. Copper gear also has slightly enhanced efficiency during rain and thunderstorms, adding a dynamic weather-based element.
      
Emerald Tools and Armor: Equip yourself with emerald tools and armor, a tier above iron but below diamond. Emerald gear offers increased durability and efficiency, providing a valuable mid-to-late-game option for players seeking superior performance.
   
## Villager Management:
## 
Villager Summoning Totem: Craft a unique totem that allows you to summon villagers to your desired location. This feature simplifies villager trading setups and eliminates the need for lengthy transportation methods, streamlining your gameplay.

## Crafting Enhancements:
##        
Craftable Saddles, Name Tags, and Horse Armor: Gain the ability to craft previously uncraftable items. This addresses common player frustrations and provides a more self-sufficient gameplay experience, especially in situations where these items are scarce.

# Why choose Neo Vanilla Additions?
# 
## Seamless Integration: All features are designed to feel like natural extensions of the vanilla game, maintaining the core Minecraft experience while adding valuable improvements.

## Quality-of-Life Focus: This mod tackles common player frustrations, such as the difficulty of obtaining certain items and managing villagers, providing practical solutions.
   
## Balanced Progression: The addition of copper and emerald gear offers a smoother and more rewarding progression curve, filling gaps in the existing item tiers.
   
## Increased Player Agency: Crafting previously uncraftable items empowers players to be more self-sufficient and adaptable.
  
## Enhanced Utility: Copper is given a new purpose and emeralds are made more useful.

## Simplified Gameplay: The villager summoning totem greatly simplifies villager transport.

If you're looking to enhance your Minecraft experience without straying too far from the vanilla feel, Neo Vanilla Additions is the perfect mod for you. It provides practical improvements and valuable additions that make the game more enjoyable and efficient.
